Anyone But You (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $88,319,668Details
International Box Office $130,586,113
Worldwide Box Office $218,905,781
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,024,667
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $782,475
Total $1,807,142
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Bea and Ben look like the perfect couple, but after an amazing first date something happens that turns their fiery hot attraction ice cold — until they find themselves unexpectedly thrust together at a destination wedding in Australia. So they do what any two mature adults would do: pretend to be a couple.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,000,344 (6.8% of total gross)
Legs:9.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,055 opening theaters/3,055 max. theaters, 9.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $94,283,814

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures

MPA Rating: R for language throughout, sexual content and brief graphic nudity.

Synopsis

Bea and Ben look like the perfect couple, but after an amazing first date something happens that turns their fiery hot attraction ice cold — until they find themselves unexpectedly thrust together at a destination wedding in Australia. So they do what any two mature adults would do: pretend to be a couple.
